task_completion.description: Verify that the customer's billing and contact details are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The billing section in the order details page shows 'Sarah Mitchell', '456 Oak Avenue', 'Portland, OR 97201', 'US', along with the email 'sarah.mitchell@email.com' and phone '503-555-0147'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Wireless Bluetooth Headphones are added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order items list includes 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (or SKU: WBH-001) with a quantity of 1.

task_completion.description: Verify that the USB-C Laptop Chargers are added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order items list includes 'USB-C Laptop Charger' (or SKU: USBC-065) with a quantity of 2.

task_completion.description: Verify that the order status is set to 'Processing'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Status' dropdown in the General order details section is set to 'Processing'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the payment method is set to 'Cash on delivery'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payment method' field (usually in the billing details edit section) is set to 'Cash on delivery'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the order has been successfully created and saved with the correct total.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page shows a confirmation like 'Order updated' or 'Order created', and the order total is calculated to be approximately $149.97.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a web browser to interact with the WooCommerce admin panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interface navigating the WordPress/WooCommerce dashboard.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to create the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like `wp wc shop_order create` or curl requests to the WooCommerce API.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent genuinely interacted with the order creation form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like opening the 'Add Order' page, typing in customer details, and searching for products in the 'Add item(s)' modal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer details: Sarah Mitchell, 456 Oak Avenue, Portland, OR 97201, US. Email: sarah.mitchell@email.com. Phone: 503-555-0147. Items: 1x Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001), 2x USB-C Laptop Chargers 65W (SKU: USBC-065). Order status: Processing. Payment method: Cash on delivery. Expected total: $149.97.
